name: M2 Lending Solutions
description_short: Unable to verify company details — website returns 403 Forbidden error, preventing assessment of M2 Lending Solutions' actual services and legitimacy.
description_long: M2 Lending Solutions is listed as a personal loan provider in the personal-loans category. However, a complete and factual assessment cannot be completed at this time. The company's website (https://m2lending.com) returns a 403 Forbidden error, which prevents access to critical information needed to verify the company's legitimacy, service offerings, loan terms, and operational status. This access restriction may indicate the website is under maintenance, the domain is inactive, access controls are in place, or the site may no longer be operational. Without access to official company information—such as loan amounts, interest rates, fees, eligibility requirements, application processes, and customer service details—it is impossible to provide accurate guidance to consumers. A 403 error is a serious red flag that warrants caution, as it prevents verification of whether the company is registered, licensed, and properly regulated. Consumers considering this lender should attempt to contact the company directly through alternative channels or verify its licensing status with state financial regulatory agencies before proceeding.
